results.title: Elephant Folio | The PDF Library that automatically organizes itself | Product Hunt
results.content: lets you import on the go. Perfect for students, academics or anyone with lots of PDFs. Launch tags:Mac•Productivity•Artificial Intelligence. No reviews yetBe the first to leave a review for Elephant Folio. ElevenAgents by ElevenLabs — Scale conversations without scaling your team. Scale conversations without scaling your team. While I was waiting at the dentist office, I found an interesting paper on Operating Systems, I saved the PDF file to the "Files" app and was never able to find it [...] # Elephant Folio. ## The PDF Library that automatically organizes itself. We accumulate a lot of PDFs. Receipts, academic preprints, or maybe an article we found that we want to read later. Organizing your PDFs is tedious work and you almost never find the documents you saved for later. - Relies on Apple Intelligence (on-device) to auto-organize your files based on their content. - Syncs your PDFs between Mac, iPad, and iPhone - Suggest new filenames - Safari extension that lets you import on [...] able to find it again... I thought to myself, there must be a better way to keep track of my PDFs, so I created Elephant Folio. This is a nice idea. PDFs just pile up and become impossible to manage after a while. Auto-organising based on content makes a lot of sense if it’s accurate enough. How well does it handle messy or mixed documents? That feels like where things could get tricky. The app samples different parts of the document. But something like a magazine would throw it off. Users can

results.title: Folio Wallet App: Organize Your Cards and Documents | Product Hunt
results.content: the App Store and Google Play, and it’s free!). Best,  Daria and the Folio Wallet Team. No reviews yetBe the first to leave a review for Folio Wallet App. [...] # Folio Wallet App. ## Organize Your Cards and Documents. ## Organize Your Cards and Documents. Store documents and cards in one place. The key insight behind it is that moving towards digital documents and digital identity will simplify life for many people by making social and public services more accessible and improving the reliability of identity verification. Love how easy and convenient Folio Wallet App makes it to store and access all my important documents and cards in one secure [...] cards in one secure place. I've been using Folio Wallet for a couple of months and now I cannot live without it for my reminding my bank cards and visa expiry. I also actively use Folio for online payments when card details are needed. Folio Wallet App is a must-have! Organizing cards and documents securely on both Android and iOS is incredibly convenient. I have a couple of questions: What types of documents can I store there, and what are the main use cases for the platform? 🙌 Documents:
